name: @quoin/tokens-tailwind
description: Tailwind v4 default palette and scales (zinc neutral), translated onto the Quoin canonical semantic-token namespace.

attribution.harvestNotes: Default v4 palette extracted byte-faithfully from packages/tailwindcss/theme.css. Tailwind v4 ships native OKLCH; values preserved verbatim. Neutral ramp = zinc. Extraction method: A.
